description_long: This is a compact, angular telephone booth constructed primarily from metal, featuring a pentagonal footprint and a robust, industrial design. The booth has vertically ribbed metal panels on its exterior, with a partially open front that provides access to the interior. Inside, a telephone handset is mounted on the right wall, visible through the open front, and a metallic back panel reflects some light. The booth stands on a sturdy, textured metal base that slightly elevates it from the ground. There is no fully enclosing door, but the structure offers some privacy and weather protection with its partial side walls and overhanging roof. The overall color scheme is a weathered gray metal, with some darker accents and a hint of red from the handset.
description: A compact, pentagonal metal telephone booth with ribbed panels, partial enclosure, and a visible handset inside. The booth stands on a textured metal base and features a weathered gray finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open access, ribbed metal panels, and partial enclosure with the interior visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the telephone handset mounted inside and the reflective back panel, with the open front clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, ribbed metal back panel and the booth's angular shape, with no access from this side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handset and open front, similar to view 1 but from the other angle.
attribute_window_configuration: one large open front panel, partial side panels with no glazing
